🎨 Culture

Notre-Dame stands restored, welcoming millions once more

Five years after the fire, Paris's cathedral opened its doors again — rebuilt by thousands of craftspeople and visited by millions.

🎨 Culture · July 4, 2026 · 1 min read

The Good Globe exists for one reason: to prove that good things happen everywhere, every single day. No doom. No fear. Only good.
